report.summary: Cycle-close 13:56 UTC — 1b4a15e still failing Vercel build (D9UZMqaEz Error); production stable on d3bce36 (284 pages); ecosystem/courses fix committed but not live; rate limiting 0/6 and fallback gaps 4/6 remain open carry-overs; Vercel trial expires in 10 days.

sections.title: QA
items: ✅ Ecosystem (78 dApp pages) + courses routes committed in 1b4a15e — directories exist in codebase
✅ Stargate JSX close-tag typo fixed ( → )
🔴 CRITICAL: Vercel build FAILED for 1b4a15e (deployment D9UZMqaEz → Error, 2m 3s) — ecosystem/courses still 404 in production
⚠️ 2 confirmed 'use client' + metadata export conflicts remain: /tools/sentiment-heatmap, /news/market-recap
⚠️ 100/284 published pages missing page.tsx — Sprint 59 crypto-cards cleanup removed pages still listed in published-pages.ts
⚠️ TypeScript errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (4 JSX syntax errors, lines 215/233/270/288) — non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors:true

sections.title: Data Pipeline
items: ✅ All 6 public API routes present: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
✅ CDN Cache-Control headers (s-maxage, stale-while-revalidate) confirmed on prices, market-dominance, fear-greed
✅ In-memory TTL caching active on all routes
🔴 Rate limiting: 0/6 routes have checkRateLimit implemented — unresolved since Sprint 38
⚠️ Fallback data: only 2/6 routes covered (prices ✅, market-dominance ✅) — fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields have NO hardcoded fallback
⚠️ Note: standup-v4 incorrectly reported rate limiting + fallback as resolved — actual file inspection contradicts this

sections.title: DevOps
items: ⚠️ Production deployment: 75pG2jQVG (Ready, 4m 10s) — a manual redeploy chain tracing back to d3bce36, NOT 1b4a15e
⚠️ 3 manual redeployments in the last 3h all bypassed 1b4a15e (Error) and are serving d3bce36
⚠️ Vercel platform: Dubai region (dxb1) unavailable — traffic being re-routed automatically
🔴 ACTION REQUIRED (Jefe): Vercel Pro trial expires in 10 days — add payment method to avoid service interruption
✅ Build times healthy: 4m 5s–4m 25s across recent successful deploys (target <5min)
✅ No error spikes observed in recent deployment logs

sections.title: Project Manager
items: ✅ SHIPPED this cycle: 1b4a15e committed — ecosystem (78 pages), courses (hub + slugs), 37 new components, stargate fix
✅ Day 15 publish: 3 learn guides promoted to production (d3bce36, 7h ago)
🔴 BLOCKER: 1b4a15e build failure must be diagnosed before ecosystem/courses can go live
⚠️ Carry-over 1: Rate limiting (0/6 routes) — opened Sprint 38, still unimplemented
⚠️ Carry-over 2: Fallback data gaps (4/6 routes) — fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields
⚠️ Carry-over 3: 100 published pages with missing page.tsx — published-pages.ts needs cleanup or pages need restoration
📌 Needs Jefe: Vercel payment method, investigate build error on 1b4a15e, decide on crypto-cards page restoration vs published-pages.ts cleanup
